# AI SRE Copilot Discussions

Welcome to the AI SRE Copilot Discussions template. Use this layout to start conversations about system features, architecture ideas, or custom agent setups.

## Discussion Topic
A brief 1-2 sentence summary of what this discussion is about.

## Context
Detail any relevant background, code references, or architectural trade-offs.

## Proposed Idea/Questions
- What is your proposed feature/design?
- What are the open questions you want the community to answer?
- How does this impact agent performance or gateway security?

## Mockups / Diagrams
If applicable, insert links to system architecture or UI mockup screenshots.
